main_contents: City-split fine-scale travel-distance records from each research unit to the nearest 1--8 ordinary EVCS and fast EVCS, in km.
National travel-distance maps and multiscale summaries merged or aggregated from the 100 m city CSV records.
City-split fine-scale 2SFCA accessibility records for 1, 1.5, and 2--8 km thresholds, including aggressive and conservative charging-power assumptions.
National 2SFCA accessibility maps and multiscale summaries under the conservative charging-power scenario.
Combined travel-distance and 2SFCA accessibility classification for identifying different types of accessibility deficits.
Aggregate-scale validation of the Star Charge EVCS data against independent Amap EVCS records.
Comparison records between OSM road distances and map API route distances.
Consistency checks for nearest 1--8 EVCS travel-distance indicators.
Consistency checks for city-level 2SFCA accessibility under 1, 1.5, and 2--8 km thresholds.
